name: Root Audit
description: Adds root directory hygiene capability to Rigby. Surfaces misplaced files in the IES root, classifies each as Move, Delete, or Unknown, and executes confirmed actions. Also adds a full system integrity scan that auto-fixes unambiguous issues and flags items requiring human review. Chains into the daily-review workflow as step 04.

files.description: Unified integrity scan + root audit skill for Rigby — runs scan rules 1-7, auto-fixes unambiguous issues, flags items requiring human review, writes timestamped findings log
New final step of the daily-review workflow — audits IES root directory for misplaced files, presents classified findings table, executes moves and deletes after confirmation
Root Audit and Integrity Scan added to Rigby's task portfolio table
NEXT STEP pointer updated to chain into step-04-root-audit.md to complete the daily shutdown sequence

changelog: Add rigby-integrity skill: unified system integrity scan with 7 rules, auto-fix capability, and timestamped findings log
Add step-04-root-audit to daily-review workflow: root directory hygiene check with Move/Delete/Unknown classification and confirmation gate
Update agents/rigby.md task portfolio: Root Audit and Integrity Scan entries added with trigger phrases and descriptions
Update step-03-update-system.md: NEXT STEP now chains to step-04-root-audit.md to complete the daily shutdown sequence
